messages.content: hey! can you translate a cv for me
As an AI language model, I can translate a CV from one language to another language. What is the source and target language?
It's Swedish and i want it translated into english
Sure, I can translate your Swedish CV into English, please provide the text or file that needs to be translated.
can i submit a pdf
Yes, you can submit a PDF and I'll try my best to translate it.
how do i submit a pdf file

I'm sorry, but as an AI language model, I don't have the capability to receive or handle files directly. However, you can copy and paste the text from your PDF file into a text document and then provide the text to me for translation. Alternatively, you can also upload the PDF file to an online language translation tool that supports Swedish to English translation.
do you speak swedish?
Ja, jag talar svenska. Hur kan jag hjälpa dig med ditt CV-översättningsbehov? (Yes, I speak Swedish. How can I assist you with your CV translation needs?)

Kan du hjälpa mig att förbättra mitt cv? Flexibel barista med enorm passion för människor och service.
Har över 5 års erfarenhet inom service samt flera specialinriktade utbildningar
inom Service och Kundkontakt för de olika områden inom serviceyrket.
Av mig kan ni förvänta er en hängiven, dedikerad medarbetare som brinner för
service, kundkontakt, nya erfarenheter, problemlösning och all dess aspekter och
utmaningar som kommer med yrket. Har mycket goda datorkunskaper.
Flexibel att jobba alla timmar om dygnet. Har varken barn eller djur

Sure, I can help you improve your CV. Here's a possible translation:

Flexible Barista with a huge passion for people and service. Holds over 5 years of experience in service and several specialized education courses in Service and Customer Contact for different areas within the service profession. You can expect a devoted, dedicated employee with a passion for service, customer contact, new experiences, problem-solving, and all the aspects and challenges that come with the profession. Has excellent computer skills. Flexible to work any hours of the day or night. Has no children or pets. 

Please note that this translation may be further improved or tailored based on your specific needs and the job you're applying for.

can you translate this: Arbetar både självständigt med mycket eget ansvar över hela cafét samt i team
där kommunikation och samspel är essentiellt för att uppnå uppsatta mål.
Utför upplärning av nyanställda inom waynes över hela Stockholm.
Jobbet kräver väldigt hög tempo med många bollar i luften men framförallt  att
ge en service på toppnivå oavsett situation.

Sure, here's an English translation:

Works independently with a lot of personal responsibility throughout the café, as well as in teams where communication and collaboration are essential to achieve set goals. Conducts training for new employees across Wayne's throughout Stockholm. The job requires a very high pace with many balls in the air, but above all, providing top-level service regardless of the situation.

can you rewrite this more professional? It's for my job resume:
Works independently with a lot of personal responsibility throughout the café, as well as in teams where communication and collaboration are essential to achieve set goals. Conducts training for new employees across Wayne’s throughout Stockholm. The job requires a very high pace with many balls in the air, but above all, providing top-level service regardless of the situation.

Certainly, here's a more professional version:

Demonstrates strong independence and personal responsibility throughout the café, while also contributing positively in team settings through effective communication and collaboration to achieve collective objectives. Provides comprehensive training for new Wayne's employees throughout Stockholm, ensuring that high standards are met. Thrives in high-pressure and dynamic environments with multiple priorities, consistently delivering exceptional customer service regardless of the situation.
difference between cv and job resume

The terms "CV" (Curriculum Vitae) and "job resume" are often used interchangeably, but depending on the country and industry, there may be some differences in their meanings or usage.

In general, a CV is a longer and more detailed document than a job resume, typically used in academic or research settings, or when applying for international jobs. A CV typically includes sections such as education, work experience, publications, research projects, awards and honors, and may be several pages long.

A job resume, on the other hand, is a shorter document typically used when applying for jobs in the private sector or specific industries, such as business, finance, or technology. It typically includes sections such as work experience, skills, education, and sometimes additional sections such as certifications, volunteer work, or interests. A job resume is usually 1-2 pages long, and its main purpose is to demonstrate how the applicant's skills and experience match the requirements of the job they're applying for.

can you translate this into english? And make it suitable for a CV. I'm telling my job experience in a company called Klarna.
Fem år i branschen har givit mig stora utvecklande erfarenheter och kunskap att
applicera för en förstklassig service.
Under åren på Klarna fick jag möjligheten att utbildas samt specialiseras
på ett par olika arbetsområden där Språk, Förhandling, Service, Utredning,
Ledarskap & Kommunikation ingick och var en stor del av mina vardagliga
arbetsuppgifter. Jobbade för Norska avdelningen på Klarna i 1,5 år där tal, höroch läsförståelsen blev en naturlig del av vardagen och gav mig grundläggande
språkkunskap i Norska.

Certainly! Here's a possible translation:

Five years of experience in the industry have given me valuable development experience and knowledge to apply towards delivering top-notch service. During my time at Klarna, I had the opportunity to receive training and specialization in several areas including Language, Negotiation, Service, Investigation, Leadership & Communication. These areas were a major component of my daily responsibilities. I worked for the Norwegian division of Klarna for 1.5 years, where I naturally gained proficiency in speaking, listening, and reading Norwegian, providing me with foundational language skills in Norwegian. 

Please note that this translation can be further improved or customized based on your specific needs and the job you're applying for.
Can you describe what a care assistant does

Sure, a care assistant, also known as a personal care aide or caregiver, provides support and assistance to people who need help with daily tasks, such as older adults, people with disabilities, or those who are recovering from an illness or injury. 

The responsibilities of a care assistant may include:

- Assisting with personal hygiene, such as bathing, grooming, and dressing
- Monitoring and administering medication
- Helping with meal preparation and feeding
- Providing transportation to appointments and social activities
- Assisting with mobility and exercise
- Performing light housekeeping tasks, such as cleaning, laundry, and organizing
- Providing companionship and emotional support
- Reporting any changes in the person's condition or behavior to a supervisor or healthcare provider

A care assistant may work in a variety of settings, including a person's home, a residential care facility, or a hospital. They may work full-time or part-time, often with flexible hours. 

In general, the role of a care assistant is to provide compassionate and professional support to people who need it, helping them maintain their independence and quality of life.

can you make this a sentence for my CV. I need to describe what i used to do when i worked as a caregiver. - Assisting with personal hygiene, such as bathing, grooming, and dressing
- Monitoring and administering medication
- Helping with meal preparation and feeding
- Providing transportation to appointments and social activities
- Assisting with mobility and exercise
- Performing light housekeeping tasks, such as cleaning, laundry, and organizing
- Providing companionship and emotional support
- Reporting any changes in the person’s condition or behavior to a supervisor or healthcare provid

Sure! Here's a possible sentence:

As a caregiver, I provided professional support to individuals by assisting with personal hygiene, monitoring and administering medication, aiding with meal preparation and feeding, providing transportation to appointments and social activities, assisting with mobility and exercise, performing light housekeeping tasks, and providing companionship, as well as communicating any changes in their condition or behavior to the appropriate healthcare providers.

I have to describe what i used to do as a production runner. can you translate this into English and rewrite it?
Rodda upp för event samt rigga ner efter event.
Mycket tunga lyft och varierande arbetstimmar, oftast nattjobb inför stora
evenemang under tidspress.
Serverade mat och dryck på olika VIP-områden samt bakom scen.
Såg till att alla krav som efterfrågades av artister bakom scenen eller i
omklädningsrummen utfördes till punkt och pricka inom specifika tidspress, som
t.ex fruktbuffé eller specifik mat.

Sure, here's a possible translation:

As a production runner, my duties included setting up for events and breaking down after events, involving heavy lifting and variable work hours, often working night shifts to prepare for large events under time constraints. I served food and drinks in various VIP areas as well as backstage. I ensured that all requests made by artists backstage or in dressing rooms were carried out to the letter within specific timelines, such as setting up fruit buffets or providing specific meals.
how to translate till punkt och pricka from swedish to english

A possible translation for "till punkt och pricka" from Swedish to English is "to the letter" or "to the tee". These expressions convey the idea of carrying out a task completely and accurately according to specific instructions or guidelines.
